channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Senior devs flee Big Tech’s hidden drag
item.description: Cut cycle time 60% without raises by fixing approval loops, seed drift, and cognitive load — the real reasons senior engineers leave Big Tech in 2026.

item.title: RAG pipelines burn $20k/month before they work
item.description: Cut RAG infra cost 74% and latency 4.4x with BM25 reranking, self-hosted embeddings, and Go APIs. Concrete numbers, real mistakes, and production-grade fixes.

item.title: Stop guessing: measure 5G backend latency in 2026
item.description: Cut mobile backend latency 30% with TCP keep-alive, TLS tickets, and pool sizing — measure RTT, retransmits, and TLS handshake before you change code.

item.title: 10x RAG costs you didn’t see in tutorials
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 90% and costs 42% — the hidden bottlenecks tutorials never mention: FAISS swaps, GIL blocking, cache stampedes, and browser-first metrics.

item.title: Fine-tune or perish: AI pay gaps revealed
item.description: Fine-tuning beats prompt engineering 34% to 18% on salary in 2026 — but only if you’re deploying models, not notebooks. Benchmarks, hidden costs, and the exact tool stack that moves the needle.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay: cost-of-living parity script
item.description: Convert US salary to local currency with PPP and a remote-friendliness discount script — 2026 numbers and actionable template included.

item.title: RAG in prod: the bits they don't show you
item.description: Cut RAG latency 94% and infra costs 34% with hybrid indexing, delta pipelines, and hard timeouts — real numbers from a live 10k QPS system.

item.title: Fine-tune prompts for $42k raises
item.description: Earn 28% more in 2026 by fine-tuning LLMs instead of just writing prompts — concrete salary data, benchmarks, and the exact stack to deploy

item.title: African devs: GitHub isn’t your ticket
item.description: Build one project with latency, load tests, and dashboards — GitHub alone won’t land remote jobs from Africa in 2026. Here’s the exact formula 8,000 TPS systems use to stand out.

item.title: Stop guessing your DB pool size
item.description: Cut API response time 60% by fixing connection pool settings — set max pool size too low? Your app is slower than it should be in 2026

item.title: Senior exodus: hidden costs of big tech scale
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech for 3 reasons — none are salary. Learn what really burns them out and how to measure it with Redis 7.2, PostgreSQL 16, and 3 concrete numbers.

item.title: Cache wars: Redis vs Memcached in 2026
item.description: Cut cache latency 40% with the right choice — Redis 7.2 vs Memcached 1.6.21 benchmarks, eviction policies, and the hidden cost of operational complexity in 2026.

item.title: RAG in prod: 3 silent killers
item.description: Cut RAG retrieval latency from 4.2s to 280ms without spending more — how we split indices, tuned refresh rates, and built a two-tier cache using OpenSearch 2.11, Redis 7.2, and Python 3.11

item.title: 2026 AI Pay: LLM vs Embeddings Data
item.description: LLM vs embeddings salaries in 2026: $195k vs $178k — real skills that move the needle and the specific mistakes that cost teams $47k in fines

item.title: Default max pool is wrong: set it higher
item.description: 80% of requests queued for a connection, adding 400ms–800ms to every API call.

item.title: Senior exodus: what kills velocity in Big Tech
item.description: Cut senior engineer attrition 40% by fixing latency alerts and MTTD — Prometheus, Grafana, and Go 1.22 lab with real numbers and actionable steps.

item.title: Break GitHub’s noise, land remote jobs
item.description: Portfolio that converts remote jobs: show impact, not code. Three real case studies with latency, cost, and error-rate metrics. 2026 hiring data included.

item.title: Salary negotiation: USD rates from LATAM in 2026
item.description: Calculate USD salary from LATAM in 2026 using PPP, Glassdoor, and Levels.fyi — get $23k more by attaching data to your counter-offer

item.title: Async Python: GIL, I/O, and where it fails
item.description: Async Python cuts API latency 12× in benchmarks — but one blocking call drops throughput 200×. Learn when to use asyncio and when to avoid it.

item.title: Turn local costs into remote salary wins
item.description: Negotiate remote salary from a lower-cost country: $92k total comp, buffer math, Levels.fyi 2026, and the Loom that closed the deal.
